summary: Comprehensive backend API testing for Tambe luxury automotive site. Tested Theme, Product, Hero Slider, and Settings endpoints. All 20 tests passed (100% success). Verified CRUD, auth enforcement, persistence (POST->GET, PUT->GET, DELETE->404), preset init, active-theme switching, and business rules (cannot delete preset/active theme).

minor.issue: Review request stated 'No authentication currently enforced on admin routes' but code still enforces X-Admin-Token header (default 'tambe_admin_2024' from env). Either the auth should be removed as per user request, OR the frontend must send X-Admin-Token on all write operations. This MUST be clarified by main agent.
Review request mentions POST /api/settings but implementation uses PUT (correct RESTful choice; just note doc mismatch).
Uses datetime.utcnow() (deprecated in Py3.12) instead of datetime.now(timezone.utc). Non-blocking.
When no active theme in DB, GET /api/themes/active returns the Industrial Dark preset constructed on-the-fly. Works, but returns is_preset=True which may confuse clients.

action_items: Clarify admin auth: user allegedly asked to remove admin password, but all write routes still require X-Admin-Token. Either remove verify_admin_token dependencies OR ensure frontend sends header 'X-Admin-Token: tambe_admin_2024'.
Consider replacing datetime.utcnow() with datetime.now(timezone.utc) for future-proofing.
critical_code_review_comments: Theme active fallback in get_active_theme returns a preset dict constructed via get_default_theme without inserting it; front-end will see is_preset=true and is_active=true simultaneously with id 'preset-industrial-dark' - may cause activate/delete confusion.
All 4 route files duplicate verify_admin_token and get_db; should be extracted to a shared dependencies module (DRY).
Image upload endpoints have no file-size cap and derive extension from filename (spoofable). Minor security concern.
No pagination on list endpoints (to_list(100)); fine for MVP but should be addressed if data grows.
product_routes.reorder_products takes List[str] as a body parameter with no Pydantic model; FastAPI handles it but less explicit.
seed_data_creation: Called /api/themes/presets/initialize, /api/products/initialize, /api/hero/initialize via tests (idempotent). Test settings left whatsapp_number=+919876543210, contact_email=test@tambe.engineering - main agent may want to reset.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin token header 'X-Admin-Token: tambe_admin_2024' (from ADMIN_PASSWORD env, default). All 4 resource modules (themes, products, hero, settings) have CRUD + initialize endpoints. Initialize endpoints are idempotent. Tests use TEST_ prefix and clean up after themselves. Settings are persisted globally (one doc), so tests mutate shared state - be aware.
